title: Craftables by smplesco
description: Adds recipes to uncraftable vanilla items.
body:
## Craft the uncraftable.
![All New Craftables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2547890682923558f8c6201c3748193c4a0771ac.jpeg)
Current items include:

- Leather/iron/gold/diamond horse armor
- Enchanted golden apple
- Totem of undying
- Name tag
- Bell
- Glow ink sac
- Packed/Blue ice
- String
- Trident
  
Please comment on what else I should add.
